title: Sitnasuak Native Corporation’s 2023 Summer Internship Program
summary: Sitnasuak Native Corporation (SNC) is now accepting applications for the 2023 Summer Internship Program. SNC Summer Internships provide SNC shareholders and descendants on-the-job training while being mentored by professionals in their field of interest. The intent of the program is to provide valua...

title: Brazil in the Arctic Council: Not as Crazy as it Sounds
summary: This commentary examines the benefits of including Brazil in Arctic dialogue through an observer membership to the Arctic Council. The post Brazil in the Arctic Council: Not as Crazy as it Sounds appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .

title: Indigenous Music – 2/6/23

title: Updates to COVID-19 vaccine clinic location and hours
summary: Effective Monday, February 6, the COVID-19 vaccine clinic will be relocated to the third floor of the hospital in Bethel. Please follow signs to the new location. title: Shareholder-Owned Business Spotlight: Plow Now AK
summary: Xavier Topkok (back center) with his family. Last December, Anchorage, Alaska received nearly 30 inches of snow from one storm — the most from a single event in more than 20 years.
